data.title: MAIA Biotechnology Inducement Offer with Investors
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. ( (MAIA) ).

On September 18, 2025, MAIA Biotechnology, Inc. entered into inducement offer letter agreements with accredited investors holding outstanding warrants for the company’s common stock. The investors agreed to exercise these warrants for cash at a reduced price of $1.30 per share, resulting in the issuance of 440,503 shares and generating approximately $572,654 in gross proceeds. The company plans to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, with the transactions expected to close around September 22, 2025.

data.description:

On September 18, 2025, Getty Images, Inc., a subsidiary of Getty Images Holdings, Inc., announced an exchange offer for its $300 million outstanding 9.750% Senior Notes due 2027, proposing to replace them with newly issued 14.000% Senior Notes due 2028. data.title: Augusta Gold Announces Merger with AngloGold Ashanti
data.description:
Augusta Gold Corp. has announced a proposed merger with AngloGold Ashanti (U.S.A.) Holdings Inc., with the merger agreement dated July 15, 2025. The merger will result in Augusta Gold becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of AngloGold Ashanti. The board of directors of Augusta Gold has unanimously approved the merger, which will be voted on by stockholders at a special meeting on October 20, 2025. Upon completion, each outstanding share of Augusta Gold will be converted into the right to receive C$1.70 in cash. This merger is positioned to impact Augusta Gold’s operations significantly, as it will transition from an independent entity to a subsidiary, potentially affecting its market strategy and stakeholder interests.

data.title: AlphaTime Acquisition Corp Amends PIPE Financing Deal
data.description:
An update from AlphaTime Acquisition Corp. ( (ATMC) ) is now available.

On September 14, 2025, AlphaTime Acquisition Corp entered into Securities Purchase Agreements with accredited investors to issue and sell $11.5 million of its ordinary shares and accompanying warrants in a private placement. This PIPE Financing is linked to the company’s business combination with HCYC Group Company Limited. The financing includes 1,150,000 ordinary shares and warrants to purchase up to 2,300,000 shares, with the warrants exercisable immediately and expiring in five years. On September 16, 2025, the agreements were amended to include HCYC as a party, maintaining the same terms for the remaining $6.5 million of the financing. The company also entered into a Registration Rights Agreement to file a registration statement for the resale of these shares, with customary terms and conditions.
